title: Paracaryum pygmaeum
taxonomy: Paracaryum pygmaeum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Paracaryum, which is a group of flowering plants found in tropical Africa. The plant's classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. At the order level, Paracaryum pygmaeum is classified as a member of Brassicales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
